title: Federal judge in Oregon orders immediate release of asylum seeker from ICE detention
description_html: The Oregonian reports on the a federal judge's order to the government that a 24-year-old asylum seeker from Mexico, Y-Z-L-H, who was arrested in the hallway of a Portland Immigration Court on June 5, 2025, be immediately released. Judge Michael H. Simon found that the asylum seeker was unlawfully detained, without justification, and that his detention was in violation of the APA. Judge Simon issued the order after a 90-minute hearing, with a written ruling to be issued next week.
